jobs.title: Combined Graduate Level Examination (CGL) 2026
jobs.summary: Recruitment for 12,256 Group B and C posts in various Central Government departments. Eligibility requires a bachelor's degree in any discipline. The application window was from May 21 to June 25, 2026, with a fee payment deadline of June 26, 2026. A correction window was available from July 1 to July 3, 2026.
jobs.fitLabel: Any-graduate management/general roles, suitable for B.Tech with software engineering experience interested in management.

jobs.org: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT)

jobs.fitLabel: Programmer Assistant 'A' requires CS/IT/Electronics degree. Data Entry Operator is a low-level clerical role.

jobs.title: Experienced Professionals on Fixed Term Basis

jobs.summary: 9 vacancies for Trainee Engineer. Eligible candidates can apply online. Mechanical B.Tech is generally eligible for Engineer Trainee roles.

jobs.title: Direct Recruitment to various posts (Advt. No. 07/2026)
jobs.summary: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has invited Online Recruitment Applications (ORA) for 450 vacancies across 54 post categories in various Central Government Ministries and Departments. These include roles such as Drug Inspector, Assistant Engineer (Civil and allied disciplines), Legal Officer, Company Prosecutor, Scientific Officer, Specialist Grade III / Assistant Professor (medical), Joint Director, Assistant Director, and Rajbhasha Adhikari. This recruitment drive covers a diverse mix of technical and administrative roles.
jobs.fitLabel: Includes potential general administrative/management roles (e.g., Joint Director, Assistant Director) that may accept any engineering bachelor's degree. Core engineering posts (Assistant Engineer) could be a moderate fit if Mechanical is an allied discipline. Other specialized roles are a low fit.

jobs.title: Specialist Cadre Officer — Database & Cloud DBA (Contract)

jobs.title: Experienced engineering professionals in the renewable energy sector
jobs.summary: NGEL has announced 114 vacancies for experienced engineering professionals in the renewable energy sector. Candidates possessing an Engineering Degree with the required post-qualification experience can apply online. The online application process commenced on 2026-07-11 and will continue until 2026-07-31.
jobs.fitLabel: Requires an Engineering Degree with post-qualification experience in renewable energy. The candidate has a B.Tech Mechanical Engineering degree and 2-3 years of software experience, which is a moderate fit for core engineering roles.

jobs.title: Engagement of Young Professionals (YPs) on Fixed Term Basis
jobs.summary: 23 Young Professional (YP-1, YP-2, YP-3) posts in various departments including Project Execution (Mechanical), AI Engineer, Data Analytics Officer, Data Scientist. Project Execution (Mechanical) is a core engineering role. AI Engineer, Data Analytics Officer, Data Scientist roles are typically IT-focused and often require specific CS/IT/Electronics degrees in government organizations, making them 'gated' for a Mechanical B.Tech.
jobs.fitLabel: Includes Project Execution (Mechanical) which is a core engineering role. IT/AI/Data Science roles are 'gated' due to typical degree requirements.
